TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kukay initu kitahaw!Ť¨ĚŤ¨ĚšĹ† šĹ†Ś•ĹŚóé? mikukay atu mabiyalaw.śĄüŤ¨ĚŤąáťóúśá∑ ciśĚéŚģ∂ŚźĆ ku musakamuway mangaleb kina libung ayda, niadih nita widamin u mubelihay ku kamu nu sinbun, wini u giing mibabuy kunikaynah pasu u matinengay mudakamu silawayay hananay mangaleb ku nikacacengan nu heni, sisa mabiyalaw tu ku binawlan caytu kahademhem, utiihsatu ku balucu' nuheni, pakayni i Kanatal caay kaw kapahay ku mahiniyay a kawaw, . dating hanitasaw, u syakay numita muliyaw ku liyaw kita i katalawan, a idaw ku sapikukay nu mita tu balucu', sayawaysa mikukay kita tuising tu kangguhu, itidakuheni isakatalawan a mikuli, ami kukay kita tu sidikuccay tu sacaay katalaw tu cila a hitay mutideng i dadadadanan, musilenud tu muculilay atu kadideng a mikulibay. . ayda katuud pakaynin i nitenunan tu dadan a micakay tu cacanan maydih pakatineng tu heniyan, anu maala ku nipatayni tu kakaneng, amikukay kita tu musakakawaway atu misangay atu muculuay patayni i lumaay a tademaw, u kuziw misanga henay amikukay kita tuyni mikuliay nu Kanatal i nilaculay a tademaw. . Kanaha tu mangaleb kina libung, musilemuday tu tatuni' tu dedemiad muwal tu tu tatuni' anu u mibakahay kisu tu tatuni' a tademaw , satabaki hank u ngiha a mikukay tuyni u miasakay a tademaw. . imahini amisatabaki kita tu sapisasukaydih tu cabay, nika inalibung tatenga mitanguu'l tu nikaudip . . anu matineng kisu tu nipihibang nu cabay namakayni i tinalibungay anu silawad pakatelay han musikul tu sasakamun, akay caayaca kapadang pakynien i sasusakamu masasukaydih akay kapah tu atudi ku balucu' nida . .imahini u kalibunga mahica siwlen ku balucu' kaw duma henay ku pabalucu'an a tahekal tu ku tinsu nitanaman nu wawa amiseking kaw wawa henay ku dadiputaniy . .u mikuliay a tademaw palitanmay ku tawki numu mahica tu kukakawaw nu kusiayda, wini micudaday tu mikingkiway sadiputen henaymay ku nikingkiwan nida idaw ku nika cakat haw . .ayda sa henulan a kawawsa pisinanuti tu wicanan ku sakautiih balenaw nu mita, nayay ku tatengaay a sasakamun. .u saykay numita sakayduhan yatusaay a kamu "kukay" atu "kapah tu kisu haw"? kukayÔĹěśĄüśĀ©ÔĹěkukayÔĹěśĄüśĀ©ÔĹěkukayÔĹěśĄüśĀ©ÔĹěkukay
S.PHON: kukaj initu kitańßaw!*** ***? mikukaj atu mabijar~…ĺaw.***** ¶i*** ku musakamuwaj maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb kina r~…ĺibuŇč ajda, niadińß nita widamin u mub…ôr~…ĺińßaj ku kamu nu sinbun, wini u giiŇč mibabuj kunikajnańß pasu u matin…ôŇčaj mudakamu sir~…ĺawajaj ńßananaj maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku nika ¶a ¶…ôŇčan nu ńß…ôni, sisa mabijar~…ĺaw tu ku binawr~…ĺan ¶ajtu kańßad…ômńß…ôm, utiińßsatu ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni, pakajni i kanatar~…ĺ ¶aaj kaw kapańßaj ku mańßinijaj a kawaw, . datiŇč ńßanitasaw, u sjakaj numita mur~…ĺijaw ku r~…ĺijaw kita i katar~…ĺawan, a idaw ku sapikukaj nu mita tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, sajawajsa mikukaj kita tuisiŇč tu kaŇčguńßu, itidakuńß…ôni isakatar~…ĺawan a mikur~…ĺi, ami kukaj kita tu sidiku ¶ ¶aj tu sa ¶aaj katar~…ĺaw tu ¶ir~…ĺa a ńßitaj mutid…ôŇč i dadadadanan, musir~…ĺ…ônud tu mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj atu kadid…ôŇč a mikur~…ĺibaj. . ajda katuud pakajnin i nit…ônunan tu dadan a mi ¶akaj tu ¶a ¶anan majdińß pakatin…ôŇč tu ńß…ônijan, anu maar~…ĺa ku nipatajni tu kakan…ôŇč, amikukaj kita tu musakakawawaj atu misaŇčaj atu mu ¶ur~…ĺuaj patajni i r~…ĺumaaj a tad…ômaw, u kuziw misaŇča ńß…ônaj amikukaj kita tujni mikur~…ĺiaj nu kanatar~…ĺ i nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. . kanańßa tu maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb kina r~…ĺibuŇč, musir~…ĺ…ômudaj tu tatuni Ē~ ° tu d…ôd…ômiad muwar~…ĺ tu tu tatuni Ē~ ° anu u mibakańßaj kisu tu tatuni Ē~ ° a tad…ômaw , satabaki ńßank u Ňčińßa a mikukaj tujni u miasakaj a tad…ômaw. . imańßini amisatabaki kita tu sapisasukajdińß tu ¶abaj, nika inar~…ĺibuŇč tat…ôŇča mitaŇčuu Ē~ °r~…ĺ tu nikaudip . . anu matin…ôŇč kisu tu nipińßibaŇč nu ¶abaj namakajni i tinar~…ĺibuŇčaj anu sir~…ĺawad pakat…ôr~…ĺaj ńßan musikur~…ĺ tu sasakamun, akaj ¶aaja ¶a kapadaŇč pakjni…ôn i sasusakamu masasukajdińß akaj kapańß tu atudi ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nida . .imańßini u kar~…ĺibuŇča mańßi ¶a siwr~…ĺ…ôn ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° kaw duma ńß…ônaj ku pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ku tinsu nitanaman nu wawa amis…ôkiŇč kaw wawa ńß…ônaj ku dadiputanij . .u mikur~…ĺiaj a tad…ômaw par~…ĺitanmaj ku tawki numu mańßi ¶a tu kukakawaw nu kusiajda, wini mi ¶udadaj tu mikiŇčkiwaj sadiput…ôn ńß…ônajmaj ku nikiŇčkiwan nida idaw ku nika ¶akat ńßaw . .ajda sa ńß…ônur~…ĺan a kawawsa pisinanuti tu wi ¶anan ku sakautiińß bar~…ĺ…ônaw nu mita, najaj ku tat…ôŇčaaj a sasakamun. .u sajkaj numita sakajduńßan jatusaaj a kamu "kukaj" atu "kapańß tu kisu ńßaw"? kukaj****kukaj****kukaj****kukaj
S.FORM: kukay initu kitahaw!Ť¨ĚŤ¨ĚšĹ† šĹ†Ś•ĹŚóé? mikukay atu mabiyalaw.śĄüŤ¨ĚŤąáťóúśá∑ ciśĚéŚģ∂ŚźĆ ku musakamuway mangaleb kina libung ayda, niadih nita widamin u mubelihay ku kamu nu sinbun, wini u giing mibabuy kunikaynah pasu u matinengay mudakamu silawayay hananay mangaleb ku nikacacengan nu heni, sisa mabiyalaw tu ku binawlan caytu kahademhem, utiihsatu ku balucu' nuheni, pakayni i Kanatal caay kaw kapahay ku mahiniyay a kawaw, . dating hanitasaw, u syakay numita muliyaw ku liyaw kita i katalawan, a idaw ku sapikukay nu mita tu balucu', sayawaysa mikukay kita tuising tu kangguhu, itidakuheni isakatalawan a mikuli, ami kukay kita tu sidikuccay tu sacaay katalaw tu cila a hitay mutideng i dadadadanan, musilenud tu muculilay atu kadideng a mikulibay. . ayda katuud pakaynin i nitenunan tu dadan a micakay tu cacanan maydih pakatineng tu heniyan, anu maala ku nipatayni tu kakaneng, amikukay kita tu musakakawaway atu misangay atu muculuay patayni i lumaay a tademaw, u kuziw misanga henay amikukay kita tuyni mikuliay nu Kanatal i nilaculay a tademaw. . Kanaha tu mangaleb kina libung, musilemuday tu tatuni' tu dedemiad muwal tu tu tatuni' anu u mibakahay kisu tu tatuni' a tademaw , satabaki hank u ngiha a mikukay tuyni u miasakay a tademaw. . imahini amisatabaki kita tu sapisasukaydih tu cabay, nika inalibung tatenga mitanguu'l tu nikaudip . . anu matineng kisu tu nipihibang nu cabay namakayni i tinalibungay anu silawad pakatelay han musikul tu sasakamun, akay caayaca kapadang pakynien i sasusakamu masasukaydih akay kapah tu atudi ku balucu' nida . .imahini u kalibunga mahica siwlen ku balucu' kaw duma henay ku pabalucu'an a tahekal tu ku tinsu nitanaman nu wawa amiseking kaw wawa henay ku dadiputaniy . .u mikuliay a tademaw palitanmay ku tawki numu mahica tu kukakawaw nu kusiayda, wini micudaday tu mikingkiway sadiputen henaymay ku nikingkiwan nida idaw ku nika cakat haw . .ayda sa henulan a kawawsa pisinanuti tu wicanan ku sakautiih balenaw nu mita, nayay ku tatengaay a sasakamun. .u saykay numita sakayduhan yatusaay a kamu "kukay" atu "kapah tu kisu haw"? kukayÔĹěśĄüśĀ©ÔĹěkukayÔĹěśĄüśĀ©ÔĹěkukayÔĹěśĄüśĀ©ÔĹěkukay
S.PHON: kukaj initu kitańßaw!*** ***? mikukaj atu mabijar~…ĺaw.***** ¶i*** ku musakamuwaj maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb kina r~…ĺibuŇč ajda, niadińß nita widamin u mub…ôr~…ĺińßaj ku kamu nu sinbun, wini u giiŇč mibabuj kunikajnańß pasu u matin…ôŇčaj mudakamu sir~…ĺawajaj ńßananaj maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku nika ¶a ¶…ôŇčan nu ńß…ôni, sisa mabijar~…ĺaw tu ku binawr~…ĺan ¶ajtu kańßad…ômńß…ôm, utiińßsatu ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni, pakajni i kanatar~…ĺ ¶aaj kaw kapańßaj ku mańßinijaj a kawaw, . datiŇč ńßanitasaw, u sjakaj numita mur~…ĺijaw ku r~…ĺijaw kita i katar~…ĺawan, a idaw ku sapikukaj nu mita tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, sajawajsa mikukaj kita tuisiŇč tu kaŇčguńßu, itidakuńß…ôni isakatar~…ĺawan a mikur~…ĺi, ami kukaj kita tu sidiku ¶ ¶aj tu sa ¶aaj katar~…ĺaw tu ¶ir~…ĺa a ńßitaj mutid…ôŇč i dadadadanan, musir~…ĺ…ônud tu mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj atu kadid…ôŇč a mikur~…ĺibaj. . ajda katuud pakajnin i nit…ônunan tu dadan a mi ¶akaj tu ¶a ¶anan majdińß pakatin…ôŇč tu ńß…ônijan, anu maar~…ĺa ku nipatajni tu kakan…ôŇč, amikukaj kita tu musakakawawaj atu misaŇčaj atu mu ¶ur~…ĺuaj patajni i r~…ĺumaaj a tad…ômaw, u kuziw misaŇča ńß…ônaj amikukaj kita tujni mikur~…ĺiaj nu kanatar~…ĺ i nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. . kanańßa tu maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb kina r~…ĺibuŇč, musir~…ĺ…ômudaj tu tatuni Ē~ ° tu d…ôd…ômiad muwar~…ĺ tu tu tatuni Ē~ ° anu u mibakańßaj kisu tu tatuni Ē~ ° a tad…ômaw , satabaki ńßank u Ňčińßa a mikukaj tujni u miasakaj a tad…ômaw. . imańßini amisatabaki kita tu sapisasukajdińß tu ¶abaj, nika inar~…ĺibuŇč tat…ôŇča mitaŇčuu Ē~ °r~…ĺ tu nikaudip . . anu matin…ôŇč kisu tu nipińßibaŇč nu ¶abaj namakajni i tinar~…ĺibuŇčaj anu sir~…ĺawad pakat…ôr~…ĺaj ńßan musikur~…ĺ tu sasakamun, akaj ¶aaja ¶a kapadaŇč pakjni…ôn i sasusakamu masasukajdińß akaj kapańß tu atudi ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nida . .imańßini u kar~…ĺibuŇča mańßi ¶a siwr~…ĺ…ôn ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° kaw duma ńß…ônaj ku pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ku tinsu nitanaman nu wawa amis…ôkiŇč kaw wawa ńß…ônaj ku dadiputanij . .u mikur~…ĺiaj a tad…ômaw par~…ĺitanmaj ku tawki numu mańßi ¶a tu kukakawaw nu kusiajda, wini mi ¶udadaj tu mikiŇčkiwaj sadiput…ôn ńß…ônajmaj ku nikiŇčkiwan nida idaw ku nika ¶akat ńßaw . .ajda sa ńß…ônur~…ĺan a kawawsa pisinanuti tu wi ¶anan ku sakautiińß bar~…ĺ…ônaw nu mita, najaj ku tat…ôŇčaaj a sasakamun. .u sajkaj numita sakajduńßan jatusaaj a kamu "kukaj" atu "kapańß tu kisu ńßaw"?
